steps.title: Write the product equation
steps.content:
The number that is $11$ less than $x$ is $x-11$, so
$$x(x-11)=350$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.
$$x^2-11x-350=0$$
$$(x-25)(x+14)=0$$

steps.title: Use the positive solution
steps.content: The possible solutions are $x=25$ and $x=-14$. The question says $x$ is positive, so use the positive solution. The answer is 25.
